narrative:
Precinct Zanesville 2-A (precinct in Muskingum County) has 1,053 registered voters, with 62.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.1 percentage points.
